title: asplenium ruta-muraria var. lanceolum
intro: Asplenium ruta-muraria var. lanceolum, also known as the wall-rue or cliff spleenwort, is a variety of fern that belongs to the family Aspleniaceae. This plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating respiratory issues such as bronchitis, asthma, and coughs, due to its expectorant and anti-inflammatory properties. The health benefits of Asplenium ruta-muraria var. lanceolum include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate congestion, and soothe sore throats. It can be prepared as a tea or tincture, and is often combined with other herbal ingredients to enhance its medicinal effects.
